历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 3279; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Qinghai Province is 2 students in 2025 and remains 2 in 2026, with a flat enrollment number, having no direct expansion or contraction impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking is approximately 79th in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 75-80 range, belonging to the national upper-middle level; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management public opinion, with no significant negative impact; Douyin popularity ranking is 70th with average reviews, short video platform exposure is moderately low, with no significant sign of increased application attention; Psychology is rated A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory A, Education A-, Physical Education A-, with outstanding strength in teacher training and psychology disciplines, attracting certain interest for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training/education majors in 2024 is divided and wait-and-see, overall tending to be stable; the number of Physics Category examinees in Qinghai Province in 2026 is approximately 30,672, a slight increase of about 0.7% from 30,457 in 2025, with slightly intensified competition; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; the university's enrollment scale in Qinghai Province is extremely small (only 2 students), with a very low enrollment proportion, and regional preference has a limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as flat enrollment plan, slight increase in examinee numbers, neutral school reputation, and divided popularity of teacher training majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 3279; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3309, with a range of 2809-3809.
